videos.headline: 'It's great in eight!' Georgia fights off Georgia Tech in 8OT classic
videos.description: After trailing 20-6, Georgia fights off Georgia Tech on Nate Frazier's 2-point conversion in the eighth overtime.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play ('It's great in eight!' Georgia fights off Georgia Tech in 8OT classic) 2024/11/29 ESHEET

videos.headline: Georgia Tech holds Georgia on 4th down for crucial turnover
videos.description: Georgia Tech stops Georgia on fourth down to take over in the first quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Georgia Tech holds Georgia on 4th down for crucial turnover) 2024/11/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Georgia Tech comes away with nothing after stalling on 7-yard line
videos.description: Georgia Tech messes up an attempt at a touchdown on third down, then the kicker misses the easy field goal on fourth down.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Georgia Tech comes away with nothing after stalling on 7-yard line) 2024/11/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Haynes King calls his own number for Georgia Tech TD
videos.description: Haynes King scores for Georgia Tech on a two-yard touchdown run late in the second quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Haynes King calls his own number for Georgia Tech TD) 2024/11/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Georgia Tech recovers fumble late in second quarter
videos.description: Georgia Tech stuns the Georgia crowd with a massive fumble recovery just before halftime.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Georgia Tech recovers fumble late in second quarter) 2024/11/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Georgia falls behind by 17 after incredible GT touchdown
videos.description: Georgia Tech's lead jumps to 17-0 after Jamal Haynes dives for the amazing score.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Georgia falls behind by 17 after incredible GT touchdown) 2024/11/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Carson Beck floats TD pass to Oscar Delp to get Georgia on the board
videos.description: Carson Beck scrambles and throws one up to Oscar Delp for the Bulldogs touchdown in the third quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Carson Beck floats TD pass to Oscar Delp to get Georgia on the board) 2024/11/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Georgia recovers late fumble with a chance to tie GT
videos.description: Chaz Chambliss comes up with a massive fumble recovery for Georgia late in the fourth quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Georgia recovers late fumble with a chance to tie GT) 2024/11/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Georgia ties up score as Beck, Lovett connect for 2nd TD

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Georgia ties up score as Beck, Lovett connect for 2nd TD) 2024/11/30 ESHEET

videos.description: Eric Singleton Jr. scores for Georgia Tech as the Yellow Jackets keep it level with the Bulldogs.

videos.description: Carson Beck finds Cash Jones for the Georgia touchdown in overtime.

videos.headline: Georgia fires back in 2OT but fail 2-pt conversion
videos.description: Georgia ties the game through Cash Jones, but their 2-point conversion is unsuccessful as the game goes to triple overtime.

videos.headline: Haynes King powers over in 2OT as GT retakes lead
videos.description: Georgia Tech just won't lie down and move back ahead via this rushing touchdown by Haynes King, but miss on the two-point conversion.
